headline: Tyler Technologies Schedules Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call and Webcast
summary: PLANO, Texas, July 15, 2026--Tyler Technologies will discuss its second quarter 2026 results during a conference call and webcast on Thursday, July 30, 2026.
